verifier_evidence.review_scope: Source-first review of checkpoint-2 assistant sidecar and control snapshot implementation, covering all declared evidence paths plus directly impacted vendor TCP transport code used by the assistant bridge.
verifier_evidence.review_coverage: Complete inspection of all declared evidence paths and the directly invoked vendor TCP wrapper. Reviewed assistant optionality/non-blocking behavior, TCP-only transport confinement, vendor isolation, snapshot ownership, and assistant-disabled wheel-evidence continuity. No hardware execution or build execution was performed in this review.
reviewed_axes: assistant integration remains optional relative to startup/control semantics
assistant path remains non-blocking in the foreground loop
vendor API confinement to assistant-owning bridge files
wheel-level evidence availability without assistant connectivity
project-owned control snapshot boundary consumed by reporter/sidecar surfaces
unreviewed_axes: runtime behavior under real hardware or live assistant transport
